candidates.text: Been living in London for 3 years and every time I come back to the US, I have to recalibrate. When you're overseas, you tend to forget what real abundance feels like, so much so, I just stood there in the granola aisle, mouth open, brain completely short-circuited as I stared at a ridiculous wall of infinite choice. Bajillions of brands, flavors, and innovations - chocolate peanut butter banana crunch, maple pecan espresso, keto, paleo, collagen-packed, probiotic, gluten-free, protein-loaded...

candidates.text: Mindhunter is one of the best things to ever come from Netflix. The show only ran 19 total episodes across two seasons on Netflix, 7 of which were directed by David Fincher. Like many, I wish this would’ve received a third season. The casting, story & production are all elite. It’s why I revisit this nearly every October around Halloween. Can’t wait to do it again.

He had only ₦100 left in his account, so he used it to play the ticket Twice with 50/50# Guess what? Just last game ( Gama Df Vs mixto EL MT) stopped the ticket from landing. I couldn't play because of the Zenith Bank issues today. I'm just happy for him. ❤️ Let's see how it ends. 🍀

freshnessRule: Use only if checkedAtTurkey is today after 07:00 Europe/Istanbul and target_date is previous calendar day.
